loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD (thd_current_r_pct) as a proxy for voltage THD, H5, and H7 harmonics because the meter does not log specific voltage harmonic columns (thd_voltage_*). Crest factor and flicker data are not measured by this meter and are omitted.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing voltage THD evolution (V-THD tab) — per-phase voltage THD columns (thd_voltage_r/y/b_pct) are mostly null on this meter, so the V-THD series will be empty. Showing current THD evolution (I-THD tab) — per-phase current THD columns (thd_current_r/y/b_pct) are available and will populate the series.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing PF Health and K-Stress trends from the shared buffer; PF Angle and K-factor scalar values are partially unmeasured (power_factor_total and kpi_true_pf are mostly null on this meter, so K-factor is derived from available data or left blank).

loop2: 1 of 3 cards hard-failed their emit (frac 0.33 < reflect.min_gap_frac 0.34); left honest-blank per-leaf, page NOT re-routed.
